item.title: Beer and the Internet, Ep. 165
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
It’s you, it’s us, it’s me, it’s Beer America TV…all hail the video beer blogger! We started our little vlog back in 2008, and you’d be hard pressed to find more then a handful on the entire internet back then. Today, there are all types and number in the hundreds . They range from homebrew […]

The post Beer and the Internet, Ep. 165 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Beer Wars, did I miss something?
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As the lights came up in the nearly empty theater I was sitting in, I felt like I had just seen a documentary made by a charmingly geeky executive formally of Mike’s Hard Lemonade who is allergic to alcohol. Now to be fair at the top, I give Anat Baron kudos for putting the time […]

The post Beer Wars, did I miss something? first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 19 – Dogtoberfest – Flying Dog Brewery
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
A deranged king and a pack of weiner dogs has inspired Flying Dog Brewery to release a beer perfect for Fall’s cool weather and holiday fare . Dogtoberfest is a true German Marzen Style, so much so, it won the Gold in that category at the 2008 GABF!

The post Episode 19 – Dogtoberfest – Flying Dog Brewery first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: BeerAmerica.TV and Mother Earth Brews – I mean News
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
With so many websites dedicated to beer and home brewing, heres one  that caught me by surprise. For almost 40 years Mother Earth News has been known as the original guide to living wisely and all things green and sustainable – before those became cool marketing terms.  It appears they know a thing a two […]

The post BeerAmerica.TV and Mother Earth Brews – I mean News first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
